description_long: This apple is round with a slightly irregular, natural shape and a subtle indentation at the top where a short, brown stem emerges. Its skin displays a blend of warm golden-yellow and red hues, with the red blush concentrated on one side and fading into the yellow. The surface is gently dimpled and matte, showing a realistic, slightly waxy texture typical of fresh apples. The apple appears firm and plump, with no visible blemishes or damage. The coloration and form suggest it is a common eating variety, likely found in markets or urban parks. The lighting highlights the apple's smoothness and the natural gradient of its colors.
description: A round, golden-yellow apple with a red blush and a short brown stem. The surface is gently dimpled and matte, showing a realistic, fresh appearance.
description_view_0: Golden-yellow apple with a subtle red blush and a visible brown stem.
description_view_1: Front view shows more pronounced red blush and a centered stem.
description_view_2: Red blush is prominent on the left, stem slightly angled.
description_view_3: Mostly golden-yellow with minimal red, stem is upright and central.
